modules.notes: No DOM targets — background sync helper
No matching selectors found in HTML inventory — banner may be injected dynamically by SW code. Verify runtime insertion before removal.
Service worker core; no DOM targets
Image helpers target gallery and image elements; HTML inventory contains matching classes/attributes for product images.
#cart-cleared-note not found in HTML inventory — confirm presence at runtime or add fallback.
#cart-cancelled-note not found in HTML inventory — potential dead selector
Primary nav selectors are present; #nav-toggle not found in inventory — likely present via other templates or dynamically generated. Keep conservative.
Modal selectors are widely present in HTML templates.
Checkout bootstrap targets appear in checkout page.
Category select element present in header templates.
Cart UI elements exist in cart templates; data-attributes for price/subtotal are used in product listings.
Business logic module — no direct DOM mapping
Most cart selectors present; confirm #btn-proceed-checkout literal exists in templates or is generated by JS.
Product option selectors and data-attributes are well represented across product pages.
PayPal integration selectors present; be conservative when touching these selectors.

selectors.notes: Header navigation structure used for layout and focus management.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep. When refactoring, add tests for keyboard focus and preserved ARIA attributes.
qa_steps: Tab to navigation and verify focus order
Open nav on mobile and check aria-expanded toggles

selectors.presence: missing (injected at runtime by nav-toggle.js or present via JS hooks)
selectors.notes: Element is created dynamically to provide a single accessible toggle for the nav. Also supports alternative JS hook selectors for compatibility.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep (runtime). If renaming, maintain backward-compatible alias or add feature-detecting fallback.
qa_steps: Inspect DOM after load to confirm #nav-toggle or data-js-nav-toggle exists
Keyboard-only: press enter/space to open/close nav

selectors.notes: Semantic container for primary navigation; used across pages.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep; minor refactors safe if ARIA and structure preserved.
qa_steps: Visual smoke test across pages
Check mobile nav open/close behaviour

selectors.notes: Primary nav list container.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep.
qa_steps: Verify menu links are reachable via keyboard

selectors.notes: Used for managing focusable items; ensure not to trap focus.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep and test focus trapping scenarios.
qa_steps: Navigate using keyboard only
Open/close modals and ensure focus returns correctly

selectors.notes: Modal trigger selector; important for accessibility and keyboard support.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep; when changing selectors, add a fallback selector to avoid breaking triggers.
qa_steps: Activate modal via keyboard and mouse
Ensure aria-hidden and focus trap behaviour

selectors.notes: Boolean marker on modal containers to provide a stable component root selector. Keeps id-based targeting for backwards compatibility.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep; prefer data-modal on new modals and add it when migrating markup.
qa_steps: Open newsletter modal via its trigger
Verify that modal has data-modal attribute and opens/closes normally

selectors.notes: Dialog role provides semantics for assistive tech and is now detected/ensured when opening modals.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep; modal opener should ensure dialog role and aria-modal are present or added programmatically.
qa_steps: Open modal and verify screen reader announces dialog role
Confirm aria-modal is set

selectors.notes: Modal close controls.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep.
qa_steps: Close modal with Escape, click, and keyboard actions

selectors.notes: Dialog container; maintain ARIA and role semantics.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep.
qa_steps: Screen reader quick test (announce dialog)
Keyboard navigation inside modal

selectors.notes: Overlay used to dim background and capture clicks.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep.
qa_steps: Ensure click on overlay closes modal when expected

selectors.notes: Dialog element where focus should land.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep.
qa_steps: Ensure focus lands in dialog when opened

selectors.notes: Displays cart count; used in critical cart flows.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep and add visual + a11y assertions in tests.
qa_steps: Add item and verify cart-count updates
Remove item and verify cart-count updates

selectors.presence: present (tbody exists; rows are populated by JS at runtime)
selectors.notes: Table body is present in HTML but rows are injected by JS; ensure render logic remains intact.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep.
qa_steps: Open cart page with items and verify rows render correctly

selectors.notes: Main cart table structure.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep.
qa_steps: Verify table layout across breakpoints

selectors.notes: Subtotal display used for checkout calculations.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep. Add assertion that subtotal matches expected value after cart edits.
qa_steps: Change quantities and verify subtotal updates

selectors.notes: Grand total display.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep and test during checkout E2E.
qa_steps: Verify total matches PayPal payload values

selectors.notes: Shipping estimate output; sensitive to postcode and postage data.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep and add tests for shipping estimator edge cases.
qa_steps: Enter postcodes and verify shipping updates

selectors.presence: missing statically (created by cart UI at runtime)
selectors.notes: Action buttons are created when cart rows render; not present in static HTML.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep (runtime). If changing, ensure existing click handlers remain bound or migrated safely.
qa_steps: Render a cart with items and remove an item; verify cart updates and totals recalc

selectors.notes: Primary add-to-cart form selector for products.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep; add tests to verify add-to-cart via form submission and via JS product options.
qa_steps: Submit form and ensure cart contains correct SKU and quantity

selectors.notes: Product option groupings for variants.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep.
qa_steps: Change product options and verify cart item metadata

selectors.notes: Product container used across store pages. Recommend migrating to a component-root '[data-product]' for stability.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep. When introducing '[data-product]' add dual-selector fallbacks in JS and tests.
qa_steps: Visual check of product cards across pages

selectors.notes: Prefer data-attribute component root for product cards to avoid descendant selector breakage.
selectors.recommended_action: When migrating, add '[data-product]' to product containers and ensure cart-init accepts it.
qa_steps: Add '[data-product]' to a single product and ensure add-to-cart, image extraction and sku detection still work

selectors.notes: Preferred selector for a product title; JS will use it before legacy heading selectors.
selectors.recommended_action: Add '[data-product-title]' when migrating product markup; keep legacy headings until tests pass.
qa_steps: Add '[data-product-title]' to a product and verify add-to-cart uses the title

selectors.notes: Preferred product-level price attribute; used as a fallback when per-option prices are missing.
selectors.recommended_action: Add cautiously with E2E checks to ensure price extraction continues to be accurate.
qa_steps: Add data-product-price and verify totals during checkout

selectors.notes: Explicit image attribute for product cards; helps in reliable image extraction and performance tweaks.
selectors.recommended_action: Add when migrating product cards; product-helpers will apply image classes and lazy-loading.
qa_steps: Add data-product-image to a product image and verify it is used in cart and gallery enhancements

selectors.notes: SKU attribute for product cards to avoid parsing DOM text content.
selectors.recommended_action: Add for better SKU extraction and to make cart item uniqueness more robust.
qa_steps: Add data-product-sku and verify cart items store the correct sku

selectors.notes: Microdata annotation; not mission-critical but useful for SEO.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep.
qa_steps: SEO smoke check if changing markup

selectors.notes: Used by shipping estimator and rate calculations.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep and add regression tests for shipping estimator with varied postcodes.
qa_steps: Enter test postcodes and verify shipping cost calculations

selectors.notes: Form used to progress to checkout; essential for flow.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep and add form submit E2E tests (desktop/mobile).
qa_steps: Complete checkout flow from cart confirm to PayPal redirect

selectors.notes: Primary CTA to proceed — high-risk to change selector without fallback.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep; if changing name or ID, add backwards-compatible hook.
qa_steps: Click proceed and ensure checkout page loads with correct cart payload

selectors.presence: rows are runtime-populated but tbody is present
selectors.notes: Row elements are dynamic — migration must keep rendering logic aligned.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep.
qa_steps: Verify rows render and their remove buttons work

selectors.presence: mostly runtime (legacy fallback may generate these)
selectors.notes: Class assigned to row items; may be generated dynamically.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep (runtime). If refactoring, ensure selectors used for event delegation remain compatible.
qa_steps: Test delegation-based handlers like quantity change and remove

selectors.notes: Used to display error messages during checkout.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep and ensure clients of this element set aria-live attributes as needed.
qa_steps: Trigger a checkout error and verify the message is displayed and announced

selectors.notes: Category select component.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep.
qa_steps: Change categories and verify navigation target

selectors.notes: Container where checkout summary is rendered; critical for PayPal payload generation.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep and include in E2E payload checks.
qa_steps: Ensure summary data matches cart and PayPal payment details

selectors.notes: Payment container used for SDK buttons or redirect form.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep.

selectors.notes: Container for PayPal SDK buttons when enabled.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep and test both SDK and non-SDK modes.
qa_steps: Enable SDK mode (if configured) and verify UI renders

selectors.notes: Fallback redirect form for PayPal; must be preserved for redirect-mode payments.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep and include form payload validation in E2E.
qa_steps: Submit redirect flow and verify PayPal receives expected POST payload

selectors.notes: Redirect button used to submit the paypal redirect form.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep.
qa_steps: Click pay-now and verify redirect form submits

selectors.notes: Debug area for PayPal payloads; optional in production.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep or hide behind debug configuration.

selectors.notes: Service worker update UI is injected when a new SW is available.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep (runtime). When refactoring SW UI, keep an opt-in/backwards-compatible approach.
qa_steps: Simulate SW update and confirm banner appears and functions

selectors.notes: Action button to apply update.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep (runtime).
qa_steps: Click update to ensure new service worker claims and reload behaviour is correct

selectors.notes: Dismiss control for SW update banner.
selectors.recommended_action: Keep (runtime).
